items.title: Pinckus: Motion Graphics「绣球」
items.description: A motion graphics reference centered on soft floral clustering, orbiting forms, and tactile graphic rhythm.
items.longDescription: 一个围绕绣球花形态展开的动态视觉参考，适合观察柔软聚合、轨道运动、几何线条和触感图形节奏的组合方式。
items.author: Pinckus

items.title: Ampersand No.3 - In & Out
items.description: Seb Cornelius' type-motion experiment uses one glyph as a stage for entry, exit, masking, and timing.
items.longDescription: 一个以 ampersand 字符为主体的字体动态实验，把进入、退出、遮罩和节奏控制压缩在一个清晰的图形舞台里。
items.author: Seb Cornelius

items.title: Tabs Need a Clear Job
items.description: Tabs work best when choices are peers, labels are short, and switching never destroys user progress.

items.title: Configure Before the Canvas
items.description: When the output is complex, front-load intent with presets before asking users to tweak every detail.

items.title: Name the Cognitive Load
items.description: Good reviews separate visual polish from memory burden, decision cost, and recovery paths.

items.title: Show Motion as Evidence
items.description: For interaction ideas, a short loop often explains timing, causality, and state change better than copy.

items.title: AI Answers Need Edges
items.description: Make generation states, confidence, editing entry points, and undo routes visible in the same surface.

items.title: Subscriptions Need Timing
items.description: Ask after value is visible, then make price, cadence, and cancellation readable at a glance.
